steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is “behavioral economists such as Gee,” which is plural. The phrase “whose research focuses on charitable giving” describes Gee but does not change the subject. The verb must agree with the plural subject.

steps.title: Eliminate singular verbs
steps.content: Choice A, “has contended,” is singular. Choice B, “contends,” is also singular. Choice C, “is contending,” is singular and progressive. The plural present-tense verb agrees with “behavioral economists.” The answer is D.
